wiki.summary: “Johnny johnny johnny” follows the narrative of characters in the imaginary town of Wallsocket, MI. In the song, multiple elements of grooming, pedophilia, and abuse are present. The song follows a transgender teenage girl named S∗nny, and her relationship with a much older man named Johnny. Johnny affirms S∗nny for who she is, and because of that, S∗nny gives in to the sexual abuse. The SoundCloud description reads: "Just after she turns eighteen, S*nny meets an older man named Johnny with sinister motives." Read more on Last.fm.
